reference: D. Trenev, P. J. Ollitrault, S. M. Harwood, T. P. Gujarati, S. Raman, A. Mezzacapo, S. Mostame, "Refining resource estimation for the quantum computation of molecular spectra through Trotter error analysis," Quantum (2025). arXiv:2311.03719.
notes: v3: Gaussian comparison uses published Trenev et al. data with 2-qubit reduction
v2 used Q^4.60 extrapolation from STO-3G anchor (overestimated Gaussian counts)
Published Gaussian STO-3G has Q=10 (2-qubit reduction), not Q=12
Advantage ratios are ~7x-22x range, not 128x-1746x as in v2
